name: Mistral AI
recent_growth_signals: Raised $415M Series B in June 2024 at $6B valuation; but core GTM team remains lean and founder-accessible at the enterprise sales layer.
hiring_signals: Enterprise AEs, solutions engineers, developer relations
must_haves_notes: Competing against OpenAI/Anthropic on enterprise trust and EU data sovereignty — needs sharp positioning narrative and enterprise use-case content to convert API trial users into committed accounts.

name: Dust
recent_growth_signals: Raised $5M seed in 2023; growing rapidly in 2024 with enterprise pilots; covered by TechCrunch and French tech press.
must_haves_notes: Building AI assistants on top of company knowledge — needs a clear enterprise ICP segmentation and a repeatable land-and-expand motion beyond founder-led sales.

name: Nabla
recent_growth_signals: Raised $24M Series A in 2023; expanding into US healthcare market in 2024 with strong press in medical AI vertical.
must_haves_notes: AI copilot for physicians navigating a dual-market GTM (EU + US) with very different regulatory and buyer dynamics — needs localized buyer education and compliance-led content for US health systems.

name: Orus
recent_growth_signals: Raised €23M Series A in early 2024; digital-native insurance for SMEs growing fast in France with expansion signals.
must_haves_notes: Embedded insurance wedge into SME SaaS platforms — GTM challenge is building a scalable partner/channel motion rather than relying on direct SME acquisition.

name: Holistic AI
recent_growth_signals: Raised $8.5M Series A in 2023; benefiting from EU AI Act tailwinds in 2024; featured in FT and VentureBeat.
hiring_signals: Enterprise sales, compliance consultants, policy leads
must_haves_notes: AI governance and risk auditing platform riding EU AI Act compliance urgency — needs a concrete ROI and risk-reduction narrative to convert legal/compliance buyers who are skeptical of vendor-led audits.

name: Unstructured
recent_growth_signals: Raised $40M Series A in late 2023; strong OSS adoption with enterprise upsell motion accelerating through 2024.
hiring_signals: Enterprise AEs, solutions architects, developer advocates
must_haves_notes: ETL/data preprocessing layer for LLM pipelines — the OSS-to-enterprise conversion funnel is underbuilt; needs a clear ICP segmentation between self-serve developers and enterprise data teams with different value props.

name: Induced AI
recent_growth_signals: Raised seed funding in 2024; Y Combinator batch; building autonomous browser agents for enterprise workflows.
must_haves_notes: Autonomous web-browsing agents for repetitive enterprise tasks — tiny team needs to define the wedge ICP (ops? finance? HR?) before scaling outbound; classic early-stage GTM focus problem.

name: Martian
recent_growth_signals: Raised $9M seed in 2024; model routing layer for LLM cost and performance optimization; covered in AI infrastructure press.
must_haves_notes: LLM router that reduces AI inference costs for enterprises — needs a concrete cost-savings ROI narrative and case studies to move beyond developer-led trials into procurement-approved enterprise contracts.

name: Baseten
recent_growth_signals: Raised $40M Series B in 2023; fast growth in 2024 as model inference infrastructure demand surged; covered by TechCrunch.
must_haves_notes: ML model serving infra competing on performance vs. simplicity — GTM challenge is climbing upmarket from individual ML engineers to platform/infra buyers in large enterprises who need SLA guarantees and procurement compliance.

name: Superagent
recent_growth_signals: OSS project turned startup with strong GitHub traction in 2024; seed funding round; growing developer community.
must_haves_notes: Open-source AI agent framework with enterprise packaging ambition — needs to define the OSS-to-paid conversion trigger and build enterprise trust signals (SOC2, SLAs) to close non-developer buyers.

name: Arize AI
recent_growth_signals: Raised $38M Series B in 2023; LLM observability and evaluation platform seeing strong demand surge in 2024 as enterprises monitor production AI.
hiring_signals: Enterprise AEs, ML engineers, customer success
must_haves_notes: ML observability and LLM tracing platform — needs a sharper enterprise GTM that separates the data science buyer from the platform/infra buyer, with different ROI stories for each.

name: Comet ML (Opik)
recent_growth_signals: Launched Opik open-source LLM evaluation platform in 2024; strong developer traction and press coverage in LLMOps space.
must_haves_notes: LLM evaluation and experiment tracking — needs a concrete enterprise buying motion that connects LLM quality metrics to business outcomes, bridging the gap between ML teams and executive stakeholders.

name: Flair AI
recent_growth_signals: Raised seed funding in 2023-2024; AI design tool for branded content seeing rapid PLG adoption among e-commerce and marketing teams.
must_haves_notes: AI content generation for e-commerce brands — strong PLG signal but needs a team-tier and enterprise upsell motion to convert high-usage individual accounts into company-wide contracts.

name: Gentrace
recent_growth_signals: Y Combinator W23; raised seed in 2023; LLM pipeline testing and evaluation growing strongly in 2024 as enterprises demand production-grade AI quality.
must_haves_notes: LLM testing and evaluation infra — early-stage with strong technical ICP but needs a GTM playbook to reach AI product managers and engineering leads who own quality gates in enterprise AI pipelines.

name: Traceloop
recent_growth_signals: Y Combinator W23; OSS OpenLLMetry project with strong GitHub stars; seed funding; acquired by groundcover in 2024 — pre-acquisition growth was strong.
must_haves_notes: OpenTelemetry-based LLM observability — the OSS community traction was real but enterprise packaging and sales motion were underdeveloped before acquisition; similar companies face the same challenge.

name: Instabase
recent_growth_signals: Raised $45M in 2024; document intelligence and AI automation for financial services; strong enterprise press coverage.
must_haves_notes: Document processing AI for FSI — needs vertical-specific GTM plays for insurance, banking, and lending with compliance-first messaging to reach risk and ops buyers who control budget but are not technical.

name: Sardine
recent_growth_signals: Raised $51.5M Series B in 2023; fraud and compliance platform growing fast in 2024 with crypto and neobank customers.
must_haves_notes: Fraud prevention and KYC/AML compliance for fintechs — needs a clearer wedge narrative between its fraud and compliance products to avoid conflating buyer personas (risk ops vs. compliance officer) and losing deals to specialists.

name: Numeral
recent_growth_signals: Raised €7M seed in 2023; bank payment infrastructure API growing in 2024; covered in French and European fintech press.
must_haves_notes: Payment orchestration API for fintechs connecting to European bank rails — needs a compelling developer-first GTM and a clear comparison narrative vs. legacy SEPA infrastructure providers to win enterprise fintech clients.

name: Defacto
recent_growth_signals: Raised €15M Series A in 2023; embedded B2B BNPL and working capital for marketplaces and SaaS platforms expanding in 2024.
must_haves_notes: Embedded working capital API for B2B marketplaces — needs a partner-led GTM playbook targeting vertical SaaS platforms (logistics, construction, retail) where cash flow is a known pain point for their SME users.

name: Slope
recent_growth_signals: Raised $30M Series A in 2022; B2B BNPL and net terms platform gaining traction with e-commerce and wholesale in 2024.
must_haves_notes: B2B BNPL embedded into wholesale and e-commerce checkout — needs a vertical-specific landing motion (which industries first?) and a clear ROI story for the platform buyer (increased GMV, reduced DSO) vs. end-buyer benefit.

name: Karmen
recent_growth_signals: Raised €55M total funding including Series A in 2023; revenue-based financing for SaaS and e-commerce companies growing strongly in France.
must_haves_notes: Revenue-based financing for European SaaS — needs a clear differentiation narrative vs. bank debt and VC dilution, and a scalable outbound motion targeting SaaS founders at the $500K-$5M ARR stage who are capital-constrained.

name: Agentio
recent_growth_signals: Raised seed funding in 2024; building AI agent infrastructure for enterprise automation; early press coverage in AI agent space.
must_haves_notes: AI agent deployment and management platform — early stage with a narrow technical ICP; needs to define the non-technical buyer (COO, VP Ops) narrative and ROI story to expand beyond developer-only adoption.

name: Stigg
recent_growth_signals: Raised $2.7M pre-seed; product-led billing and monetization infrastructure for SaaS growing in 2024 as AI companies need usage-based billing fast.
must_haves_notes: Monetization infrastructure for SaaS and AI products — direct GTM opportunity: AI companies launching agent products need usage-based billing in weeks, not months; Stigg needs case studies and outbound targeting AI-first SaaS teams specifically.
